arts.ttl: Aston Villa star Emi Martinez finds himself in hot water as two-game ban confirmed
arts.sum: Emiliano Martinez will miss Argentina's next two international games after the Aston Villa star was given a two-match ban by FIFA for "offensive behaviour". The 32-year-old goalkeeper repeated his infamous celebrations from the 2022 World Cup shortly after Argentina defeated Chile on September 6.

arts.ttl: Ipswich boss Kieran McKenna pays Unai Emery and Aston Villa ultimate compliment
arts.sum: Ipswich Town manager Kieran McKenna has long admired Unai Emery's work having studied his teams down the years. We will be sending the latest breaking news and top Villa stories directly to the WhatsApp community and we want you to be part of it.

arts.ttl: Team News: Ipswich Town vs. Aston Villa injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Ipswich Town and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Argentina's Emiliano Martinez hit with ban for "offensive behaviour"
arts.sum: Argentina goalkeeper Emiliano Martinez will miss the next two World Cup qualifiers after being hit with a ban for "offensive behaviour".

arts.ttl: West Ham join Aston Villa in the race to sign 23-year-old Serie A attacker
arts.sum: West Ham United are reportedly keen on signing the AC Milan winger Samuel Chukwueze. The 23-year-old has not been able to hit the ground running in Italian football since the move from Villarreal and he is already being linked with an exit from the Italian club. arts.ttl: ‘a deal could happen in January’: Aston Villa tipped to move for Liverpool utility man
arts.sum: Aston Villa have been linked with a move for the Liverpool defender Joe Gomez. According to Aston Villa podcaster Ty Bracey, a move for the 27-year-old Englishman could be on the cards in january. arts.ttl: Ipswich Town: Jacob Greaves on Portman Road switch and Premier League
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: Jacob Greaves left boyhood club Hull City to sign for Town Greaves is adamant that his love of golf has helped him settle in at Ipswich. I’ve come miles away from home to a new team, and you’ve obviously got the step up to play in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: McKenna: We're still finding out our Premier League style, and that's fine
arts.sum: Ask Kieran McKenna what style he wants his Ipswich team to play this season and he might surprise you.

arts.ttl: McGinn, Cash, Mings - Aston Villa injury latest and return dates ahead of Ipswich Town clash - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Aston Villa will be without four players for their trip to Ipswich Town this weekend, including long-term absentees Tyrone Mings and Boubacar Kamara. John McGinn and Matty Cash are the other absentees, while Jaden Philogene and Diego Carlos could both come back into the squad to face Ipswich after they trained at Bodymoor Heath in the lead up to the game.

arts.ttl: I hope I'm wrong but Aston Villa face two key stumbling blocks to Champions League dream
arts.sum: “When you're one of the clubs that end up in the Champions League on a regular basis, you build a squad that has the mentality for coping with the extra psychological pressure, as well as the football side of it. Despite injuries suffered to his team in the last campaign, Villa managed to qualify for Champions League football, but Allardyce claims the "stress" of playing in Europe's elite club competition could take its toll.
